label.description: Accessible label for the chart. Required for screen readers.

description.description: Optional description rendered below the label.

data.description: Rows of data. Each row must include the keys named by the `xField`, `yField`, and `valueField` props.

xField.description: Key on each datum used for the x-axis (columns).

yField.description: Key on each datum used for the y-axis (rows).

valueField.description: Key on each datum used for the numeric cell value.

height.description: Pixel height of the chart viewport. Default `280`.

loading.description: Whether the chart is in a loading state. Default `false`.

dataTableCaption.description: Custom data table caption; falls back to `label`.

class.description: Custom class applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Snippet rendered when the chart has no data.

unsupportedProps.name: loadingContent
unsupportedProps.description: Snippet rendered while the chart is loading.
